### 📊 Impact Severity
<!-- Rate the severity of this vulnerability -->
- **Critical**: Can lead to complete system compromise
- **High**: Can lead to significant data breach or system compromise
- **Medium**: Can lead to limited data exposure or system impact
- **Low**: Minimal security impact

## 🙏 Thank You!

Thank you for helping us keep SarkariSaathi secure! Your responsible disclosure helps protect millions of users.

**हिंदी में**: SarkariSaathi को सुरक्षित रखने में हमारी मदद करने के लिए धन्यवाद! आपकी जिम्मेदारीपूर्वक खुलासा लाखों उपयोगकर्ताओं की सुरक्षा में मदद करता है।

---

## 🚨 Important Notes

### 🔒 Confidentiality
- **Keep this report confidential** until a fix is deployed
- **Don't share details** publicly
- **Follow responsible disclosure** practices

### ⏰ Timeline
- **Initial Response**: Within 24 hours
- **Assessment**: Within 3 business days
- **Fix Deployment**: Within 30 days (depending on severity)
- **Public Disclosure**: After fix is deployed

### 🎯 Rewards
- **Bug Bounty**: Eligible for bug bounty program
- **Recognition**: Public acknowledgment (if desired)
- **Swag**: SarkariSaathi merchandise
- **Hall of Fame**: Security researcher recognition

---

**🔒 Security is a shared responsibility. Thank you for being a responsible security researcher!**

---
